mapper.sql: id, test_id, part_group_id, title, audio_url, audio_object_key, transcript_text, display_order, is_deleted
mapper.insert: insert into listening_material ( test_id, part_group_id, title, audio_url, audio_object_key, transcript_text, display_order, is_deleted ) values ( #{testId}, #{partGroupId}, #{title}, #{audioUrl}, #{audioObjectKey}, #{transcriptText}, #{displayOrder}, 0 )
mapper.select: select from listening_material where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select from listening_material where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, id asc
select from listening_material where test_id = #{testId} order by display_order asc, id asc
select from listening_material where part_group_id = #{partGroupId} and is_deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, id asc
select from listening_material where part_group_id = #{partGroupId} order by display_order asc, id asc
mapper.update: update listening_material set part_group_id = #{partGroupId}, title = #{title}, audio_url = #{audioUrl}, audio_object_key = #{audioObjectKey}, transcript_text = #{transcriptText}, display_order = #{displayOrder} where id = #{id}
update listening_material set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update listening_material set is_deleted = 1 where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 0
update listening_material set is_deleted = 1 where part_group_id = #{partGroupId} and is_deleted = 0
update listening_material set is_deleted = 0 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
update listening_material set is_deleted = 0 where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 1
update listening_material set is_deleted = 0 where part_group_id = #{partGroupId} and is_deleted = 1
